---
name: Bug report
about: Something isn't working correctly
title: ''
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

**Describe the bug**
A clear description of what went wrong and what you expected to happen.

**Steps to reproduce**
1. Go to '…'
2. Click on '…'
3. See error

**What happened vs. what you expected**
<!-- e.g. "The spectrum chart froze after 30 seconds" vs. "It should keep scanning" -->

**Environment**
- macOS version: <!-- e.g. 15.4 -->
- Mac model: <!-- e.g. MacBook Pro M3 -->
- WiFi Lens version: <!-- "About WiFi Lens" in the menu bar -->
- Installation: <!-- GitHub Release / built from source -->

**Wi-Fi hardware (if relevant)**
- Wi-Fi chipset: <!-- System Information → Network → Wi-Fi → Card Type -->
- Router / AP model:

**Screenshots or logs**
If applicable, attach screenshots or relevant log output.
Crash logs are saved by the app at `~/Library/Logs/WiFi Lens/`.
